**Senior Software Test Engineer**

 At Shell Recharge Solutions, we are looking for candidates who want to be a part of something bigger than themselves – passionate, purpose\\-driven individuals who believe having a career means making a meaningful impact on our business and the world. We believe in creating and doing ‘the right thing’ through responsible and sustainable EV deployment. We are looking for the innovative, driven to find a solution in a complex and dynamically evolving marketplace and look at “no” as just a challenge to find the next “yes”.
 



**Shell Recharge Solutions is seeking a Senior Software Test Engineer!** 




**What you’ll do:**




 • Establish performance benchmark and optimize application performance for Cloud applications.

 Qualifications
 


* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or equivalent experience.
* 5–8 years of relevant experience in software testing, with strong focus on Test Automation.



  









 Must Have
 


* Strong hands\\-on experience in Automation Testing using Java and Selenium (framework development, maintenance, CI integration).

 Good to Have

**What We Offer:**

description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
**Role Purpose** 




 The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
 


 ͏
 
**Do** 




 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
 


* Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
* Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
* Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
* Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
* Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
* Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
* Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities


 ͏
 
 2\\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
 


* Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
* Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
* Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
* Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
* Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
* Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
* Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
* Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
* Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
* Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders

* Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work

* Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements

title: AI Product Operations & Solutions
description:
What is AI Product Operations \\& Solutions?
 



 Think Forward Deployed Engineer at Palantir, but for conversational AI.
 



 You'll embed with enterprise clients; aviation to FMCG to banking\\-and architect AI agents that handle their most complex workflows. At scale. With compliance. Under pressure.
 



**You sit at a unique intersection: Consulting × Product Ops × Customer Management ×Prompt Design ×AI Evals × Analytics × Systems Integration \\& Workflows** 




 You're not just building AI agents. You're architecting the \\*\\*voice\\*\\* of enterprises. Their customer interactions. Their operational workflows. Their business outcomes.
 



  





 You're doing it using Blue Machines' cutting\\-edge proprietary platform.
 



  




* Industry\\-leading infrastructure
* Lowest latency in voice AI
* State of the art orchestration with best of breed models
* Built\\-in guardrails and disaster recovery
* Workflow builder with complex business and tech logics
* Eval platform for analytics and observability
* Enterprise\\-grade scalability and reliability

* Ask sharp questions before jumping to solutions

* Care about outcomes, not buzzwords
* Communicate clearly in writing (updates, docs, change notes)
* Iterate relentlessly \\- test, learn, improve, ship weekly
* Think in systems \\- see workflows, dependencies, leverage points
* Stay deeply curious about AI, not superficially
* **Why This is Career\\-Defining**
* **You're learning what 99% of people only read about:**
* Agentic AI orchestration in production
* Enterprise workflow automation at scale
* Context graphs and organizational memory
* Real\\-world deployment of frontier models



  




* **You're building rare, high\\-leverage skills:**
* AI\\-native problem solving (prompting, evals, systems design)
* System thinking across industries
* Consulting \\+ product \\+ operations fluency
* Enterprise relationships and business development



  




* **Your work has measurable impact:**
* Every agent you deploy handles thousands of conversations
* Every optimization ships to production weekly. Real world, real customers
* You're not building features \\- you're delivering revenue and business outcomes through orchestrating AI
* **You're positioned for the future:**
* After this, you can move into core AI product work, enterprise AI deployment, build your own AI company, or lead AI transformation consulting within large orgs and consultancies. You'll understand what works and what doesn't. At scale.



 Requirements
 



 Where Are You At?
 


* Associate: 2\\-4 years in tech, consulting, or operations. Curious about AI. Comfortable with ambiguity. Hungry to learn.
* Senior Associate: 4\\-6 years in product, consulting, or customer\\-facing tech. You've worked with clients or cross\\-functional teams. You want to own projects.
* Lead: 6\\+ years working on complex projects, products or client relationships. You've worked with enterprises. You understand business outcomes and technical execution.



 What will you do?
 



**Associate \\- Master the Craft** 




 Work with leads to build and test agents before deployment.
 


* Design prompts, run evals, analyze conversation flows
* Monitor live agents: dashboards, call quality, containment rates
* Learn workflow mapping, system integrations, compliance frameworks
* Support deployments with testing, documentation, optimization



**You'll learn:** 
 Prompt engineering, evaluation design, agentic systems, enterprise workflows.
 



  





**Senior Associate\\- Own POCs**




  





 Lead mid\\-market deployments independently.
 


* Run discovery with client stakeholders, decode their workflows
* Design and deploy AI agents for POC use cases
* Integrate with client systems (CRM, telephony, APIs)
* Drive from demo to production, iterate based on data



**You'll master:** 
 Client consulting, technical independence, system integration, outcome delivery.
 



  





**Lead (6\\+ years) \\- Scale Enterprises**




  





 Own strategic accounts with top\\-tier clients.
 


* Lead large\\-scale deployments (airlines, banks, healthcare)
* Provide consultative guidance on voice AI strategy and transformation
* Manage complex stakeholders, workflows, drive business outcomes for customers
* Build evaluation rigor and continuous improvement at scale



**You'll drive:** 
 Strategic consulting, relationship management, business scaling, technical voice AI leadership.
 



 This role likely requires:
 


* Fast iteration
* High ownership
* Client pressure



 Non Ideal Fit:
 


* Pure data scientists who don’t like clients
* Pure sales profiles without systems depth
* Engineers who dislike ambiguity

description:
**Company Overview**
 Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1\\.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business\\-critical data that is trapped inside of documents.  What you'll do
   

  

 We are looking for a highly experienced Lead Software Engineer to drive the architecture and delivery of the Packaging and Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) platform. This is a critical and high\\-visibility role responsible for building scalable, extensible, and reliable platform capabilities that enable product teams, partners, and ISVs to package, promote, and manage application assets across environments. As a technical leader, you will own end\\-to\\-end solution design, lead complex cross\\-team initiatives, and influence the technical direction across multiple organizations. You will work closely with Product, Architecture, and Engineering teams in a globally distributed environment to deliver foundational platform capabilities.
   

  

 This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Engineering Manager.
   

  

**Responsibility**
* Lead the architecture and delivery of the Packaging and ALM platform, driving technical vision and execution for a strategic initiative

* Author and present high\\-quality engineering design documents and drive alignment with senior stakeholders

* Establish platform standards, service contracts, and long\\-term extensibility models

* Identify and proactively resolve technical and organizational blockers
* Mentor and guide senior engineers and promote a culture of ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement
* Represent the team in roadmap planning, executive reviews, and cross\\-organization technical discussions
* Contribute hands\\-on to critical areas of system design and implementation when required


 Job Designation
   

  

**Hybrid:** 
 Employee divides their time between in\\-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in\\-office expectation)
   

  

 Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law.
   

  

 What you bring
   

  

**Basic**
* 12\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering
* Proven experience leading the design and delivery of large\\-scale, distributed systems and platform initiatives
* Strong expertise in system design, microservices architecture, and cloud\\-native application development
* Hands\\-on experience building scalable backend services using modern programming languages such as Node.js, C\\#, Java, or Go
* Experience with containerization and orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes
* Strong understanding of multi\\-region architectures, high availability, resiliency, and disaster recovery
* Experience designing and evolving platform APIs, service contracts, and extensible frameworks
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related field


**Preferred**
* Experience building packaging, deployment, ALM, or platform engineering solutions.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, release orchestration, and environment promotion workflows.
* Experience with dependency management, versioning strategies, and artifact lifecycle management.
* Exposure to REST and GraphQL API design and event\\-driven architectures.
* Experience with observability and operational excellence tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or Datadog.
* Understanding of authentication and authorization standards such as OAuth2, OpenID Connect, and JWT.
* Experience working on SaaS platforms serving external developers, partners, or ISVs.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills with experience working across globally distributed teams
* Proven ability to mentor senior engineers and lead through influence
* Demonstrated ability to create high\\-quality design documentation and present technical solutions to diverse stakeholders


 Life at Docusign
   

  

**Working here**
 Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal.
   

  

 We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live.
   

  

**Accommodation**

 If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.

title: AI Product Engineer, Go-to-Market
description:
Job Role: AI Product Engineer, Go\\-to\\-Market
 



  





 Who We Are
 



 Omnissa is shaping the future of End User Computing. Our innovative solutions, including Workspace ONE and Horizon, empower organizations to deliver seamless, secure digital workspaces. We’re proud to serve a broad base of numerous Fortune 500 companies as well as leading government institutions and agencies, helping them power secure, scalable digital work environments.
 



 As a recently independent company backed by KKR, we’re in high\\-growth mode—scaling rapidly and building for the future.
 



  





 About This Role
 



 We are seeking a trailblazing AI Product Engineer to join our team in Bangalore, India, to pioneer a new paradigm of product development within our Engineering team—a critical component of Omnissa’s Go\\-to\\-Market strategy.
 



 In this unique role, you will act as a technical leader orchestrating a digital workforce. Partnering closely with our Product Management team, you will take defined business requirements and act as the "manager" of your own team of AI developers and architects (using cutting\\-edge tools like Salesforce Agentforce and Cursor.ai). You will direct your AI agents to autonomously break down, design, write, and deploy the code yourself.
 



 In this hybrid role, you will work in\\-office 3 days a week, collaborating to drive the success of our Go\\-to\\-Market ecosystem. This is an exciting opportunity to shape a key system that enhances our Go\\-to\\-Market motions while working at the absolute forefront of AI\\-assisted enterprise development.
 



 What is the Opportunity?
 



 As an AI Product Engineer for our Go\\-to\\-Market Engineering team, you will play a pivotal role in executing the vision for our Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, and Support organizations. You will receive business logic and requirements from Product Management and serve as the technical subject matter expert who translates that vision into reality.
 



 Instead of managing a traditional engineering pod, you will leverage an agentic AI framework to turn the product backlog into robust, user\\-focused solutions at unprecedented speeds. Bringing an engineering background and deep Salesforce.com expertise, you will lead your AI agents through solution design, code generation, and deployment.
 



 You will also be responsible for:
 


* **Requirement Deconstruction:** 
 Partnering with Product Management to ingest defined business requirements, breaking them down into actionable technical specifications, system architecture, and solution designs.
* **Managing AI Agents (Agentic Development):** 
 Acting as the "engineering manager" for a suite of AI tools (like Cursor.ai and Salesforce Agentforce), delegating tasks to your digital team to rapidly generate, test, and deploy code.
* **AI\\-Driven Solutions:** 
 Directing the design, development, and deployment of features on the Salesforce.com platform (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud) utilizing both traditional APEX/LWC and modern AI frameworks.
* **Technical Ownership:** 
 Owning the execution of the product backlog, reviewing and refining the output of your AI agents to ensure code quality, security, and system efficiency.
* **Cross\\-Functional Collaboration:** 
 Communicating effectively with Product Management, Go\\-to\\-Market, and Service teams to demonstrate AI\\-generated prototypes, iterate rapidly based on feedback, and ensure the technical solution aligns with business goals.
* **System \\& AI Optimization:** 
 Monitoring and evaluating the performance of the Customer Success systems, including the efficacy, accuracy, and efficiency of your deployed AI agents and automated workflows.



  





 What will you bring to Omnissa?
 


* 3\\-4 years of experience in a Salesforce Developer, Technical Product Owner, or Solution Architect role, with a strong track record of delivering internal applications for Back Office or Front Office IT systems.
* Experience developing and deploying Salesforce capabilities (APEX), with a strong desire to master—or existing experience in—Salesforce Agentforce.
* Hands\\-on experience or strong familiarity with AI\\-assisted coding tools (e.g., Cursor.ai, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, etc) and a deep understanding of how to prompt and orchestrate LLMs to solve complex architectural logic.
* A strong engineering background paired with technical leadership sense; the ability to understand business requirements from PMs and articulate them into precise instructions for AI agents.
* Exceptional communication and collaboration skills to engage with Product Management and technical teams.
* A curious, proactive, and "hacker" mindset, with the ability to independently leverage AI multipliers to scale your output and deliver enterprise\\-grade Salesforce solutions.
* Ability to work in a hybrid role in Bangalore, India with 3 days per week in\\-office.



  





**Location:** 
 Bangalore, India
 



  





**Education:** 
 Bachelor's Degree preferred, or equivalent combination of education and relevant professional experience.
 



  





**Omnissa is an Equal Employment Opportunity company and Prohibits Discrimination and Harassment of Any Kind:** 




 Omnissa is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. All employment decisions at Omnissa are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to race, color, religion or belief, national, social or ethnic origin, sex (including pregnancy), age, physical, mental or sensory disability, HIV Status, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, marital, civil union or domestic partnership status, past or present military service, family medical history or genetic information, family or parental status, or any other status protected by the laws or regulations in the locations where we operate. Omnissa will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. Omnissa welcomes applicants of all ages.
